title: Cake World
description: A cake can have layers and so can the Overworld
body:
My singularity modfest submission

Adds layers to the Overworld, often referred to as 'Cake Worlds'. A half way point between an alternate dimension and the Overworld itself.

You can travel between Cake Worlds and the Overworld by using a linked Dimensional Blade to cut a rift you can squeeze through.

Cake Worlds look just like the Overworld however breaking and placing blocks in a Cake World does not affect the Overworld itself allowing for secret tunnels and hidden bases.
